mapper.select:
SELECT DISTINCT a.* FROM agent a LEFT JOIN agent_tag at ON a.id = at.agent_id WHERE a.status = 1
AND a.category_id = #{categoryId}
AND (a.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR a.description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR at.tag_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY a.sort_order ASC, a.id ASC
